name: Corporate Realistic
description: Professional, realistic corporate photography style. Suitable for hero images, team settings, and business context visuals.
style_prompt: Professional corporate photography, modern office environment, soft natural lighting, shallow depth of field, clean composition, business professional setting, high quality, editorial style
color_guidance: Neutral warm tones, soft blues in environment, professional lighting. The website applies its own blue overlays, so neutral/warm base images work best.
avoid: overly staged poses, stock photo cliches, harsh lighting, busy backgrounds
